scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k "npm run dev:renderer" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ./electron/main.cjs"
scripts.validate: npm run test && npm run build:renderer
scripts.clean:desktop: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); try { if (!fs.existsSync('out')) { console.log('[clean:desktop] out directory not present.'); } else { fs.rmSync('out',{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('[clean:desktop] removed out directory.'); } } catch (err) { const msg = err && typeof err==='object' && 'message' in err ? err.message : String(err); console.warn('[clean:desktop] could not remove out directory; continuing anyway. reason=' + msg); }"
scripts.diagnose:desktop: node -e "const p=require('node:path'); const local=process.env.LOCALAPPDATA||'unknown'; const cache=p.join(local,'electron-builder','Cache','winCodeSign'); console.log('[diagnose:desktop] lane=diagnosis only'); console.log('renderer_build_lane=independent'); console.log('desktop_packaging_lane=environment-sensitive'); console.log('winCodeSign_cache='+cache); console.log('if packaging fails with symbolic link privilege error, check Developer Mode / elevated shell / enterprise policy / antivirus constraints.');"
scripts.prepack:desktop: node -e "console.log('[pack:desktop] lane=desktop-packaging mode=honest-fail; if electron-builder fails, packaging is NOT successful.')"
scripts.pack:desktop: npm run clean:desktop && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --dir
scripts.predist:desktop: node -e "console.log('[dist:desktop] lane=desktop-distributable mode=honest-fail; environment/tooling failures are surfaced as non-zero exit.')"
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run clean:desktop && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win nsis
